title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CAPATAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUGUEGARAO, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 297 / 55 OG No. 17, 3086 (April 27, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2107, April 03, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF CAPATAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUGUEGARAO, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Capatan in the barrio of Libag, Municipality of Tuguegarao, Province of Cagayan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Capatan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 3, 1959.
